programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner's deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: Fun With Dick and Jane
programme.desc: After financial ruin, a married couple turn to crime to pay the bills.

programme.title: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: An uptight and by-the-book cop (Reese Witherspoon) tries to protect the sexy and outgoing widow (Sofia Vergara) of a drug boss as they race through Texas pursued by crooked cops and murderous gunmen.

programme.title: A Wicked Vendetta
programme.desc: A woman is forced to return to her role as a hostage negotiator after her daughter is kidnapped. Starring Katrina Begin (2018)

programme.title: Arctic Apocalypse
programme.desc: After a massive amount of ice from melted glaciers turns the Northern Hemipshere into a frozen wasteland, a family has to try and find a way to safety. Starring Joel Berti, Jennifer Lee Wiggins and La

programme.title: Collision Earth
programme.desc: After a small piece of a meteor crashes on Earth, a group of scientists have to work together to stop the rest of it from destroying the planet. Starring Eric Roberts (2020)

programme.title: Turbulence
programme.desc: (2016) High-flying action with Dina Meyer, Victoria Pratt and Justin Johnson Cortez. An FBI agent's flight is about to get bumpy as her mysterious seat mate forces her to make a life-or-death choice.

programme.title: Max Steel
programme.desc: Based on the popular line of Mattel toys and the hit TV series, "Max Steel" is a teenage superhero for the next generation, combining action, comedy, and cutting edge special effects into an epic adventure for the whole family.

programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Mafia loan shark turned Hollywood Producer Chili Palmer in this sharp sequel to "Get Shorty." With an unbelievably hip all-star cast that also includes Uma Thurman, André 3000, Steve Tyler, Christina Milian and The Rock, and bursting with the hottest music in the biz.

programme.title: Barbershop: A Fresh Cut
programme.desc: It's been more than 10 years since our last appointment at Calvin's Barbershop. Calvin and his longtime crew are still there, but the shop has undergone some major changes. Most noticeably, our once male-dominated sanctuary is now co-ed.

programme.title: I Feel Pretty
programme.desc: A woman struggling with insecurity wakes from a fall believing she is the most beautiful woman on the planet. Her new confidence empowers her to live fearlessly, but what happens when she realizes her appearance never changed?

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking and optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show, when hot-headed Chef Stephen is dropped into Kelly's life as a last minute replacement host. As the two struggle to make peace and a successful show, they realize they have a lot more in common than they thought - a love of food, the kids they encounter and each other.

programme.title: My Birthday Romance
programme.desc: Callie Fitzgerald is tired of her family fixing her up and questioning her single status. She is determined to find a pretend boyfriend for her 35th birthday party just so her family will leave her alone. What she didn't expect was to actually fall for him.

programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Big Mommas House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Based on the worldwide best-selling memoir starring Academy Award® winner Brie Larson and Academy Award® nominees Woody Harrelson and Naomi Watts, THE GLASS CASTLE chronicles the adventures of an eccentric, resilient, tight-knit family.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: Taylor Lautner stars in a pulse-pounding action heist film set in the world of parkour.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg leads an all-star cast in the thrilling story of real-life heroes on a burning oil rig.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Five teenagers, infused with superhuman abilities, must harness their newfound powers to battle alien invaders

programme.title: I Am Soldier
programme.desc: With the toughest selection process in the British army, does a chef have what it takes to join the S.A.S.?

programme.title: Upside Down (2012)
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: Wild Oats
programme.desc: Everything changes for Eva when she receives a life insurance check accidentally made out for five million dollars instead of the expected fifty thousand dollars. She and her best friend take the money and head out for the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: King Arthur: Excalibur Rising
programme.desc: The story of King Arth-yr Ddantgwyn comes to an end in the 520AD, in the battle of Camlann. In the heat of battle, Arth-yr, with the legendary Excalibur, lands a fatal blow to his son Mordred, before receiving a deadly wound himself. Before succumbing to his wounds, he tasks his loyal knight Sir Bedivere with returning Excalibur, the source of Arth-yr's powers, to the Lady in the Lake.

programme.title: Redline
programme.desc: For Fast and Furious junkies - time to put the pedal to the metal in this supercharged auto thriller, starring Eddie Griffin and Nathan Phillips! With the speedometer maxed out, a group of exotic car fanatics hit the streets in hopes of winning a life-changing sum of 24 million dollars. Every rule is broken as these drivers will do whatever it takes to win. Promises to give you the perfect rush!

programme.title: The Professor
programme.desc: Johnny Depp plays Richard, a buttoned-down college lecturer, whose life is turned upside down after learning he has six months to live. To the shock of his wife (Rosemarie DeWitt: La La Land) and school chancellor (Ron Livingston: The Conjuring) and the delight of his students- Richard embarks on a hilarious crusade against authority, with sex, drugs and bad behaviour in this dark comedy.

programme.title: The Bike Thief
programme.desc: A gritty British drama-thriller starring Alec Secareanu (Gods Own Country) and Anamaria Marinca (4 Months, 3 Weeks And 2 Days). The Rider is an ordinary, hard-working man who is a delivery driver for a local restaurant, which is owned and run by his landlord. When the Riders moped is stolen, his world turns upside down and a race against time starts to recover the source of his livelihood.

programme.title: Love By Accident
programme.desc: After breaking down on a road trip, a woman enlists the mechanic to be her fake boyfriend. Starring Henderson Wade (2020)

programme.title: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: A young divorce mediator remains cynical until a client's dog pairs her with a local vet.

programme.title: The Way To The Heart
programme.desc: A struggling big-city chef returns to her hometown to rediscover her passion for food and reconnect with her father. Starring Meghan Heffern (2022)

programme.title: Love At Sea
programme.desc: Olivia gets the opportunity to organise an exciting event aboard a luxury cruise.

programme.title: A Love to Remember
programme.desc: Tenley builds up the courage to ask out her online crush, Jared. With a series of misunderstands, will she be able to keep up the lie of their relationship and help save his business? (2020)

programme.title: 5 Weddings
programme.desc: A journalist writing a story on Punjabi weddings falls in love with her liaison officer who is trying to keep her story censored amidst a colorful mosaic of transgender dancers and cultural clashes.

programme.title: The Wedding Fix
programme.desc: Reeling from a break-up, professional over-planner Gwen pitches in to help put the finishing touches on her best friend's wedding. But when she's teamed up with best man Josh, a free-spirited nature guide, she finds that pulling together this wedding might not be as easy as she thought.

programme.title: Made for You, with Love
programme.desc: The owner of a second hand wedding dress business breathes new life into used dresses, making dreams come true for brides unable to afford pricey gowns. But when she meets the perfect guy, she's afraid to give her own heart a second chance at love.

programme.title: Life or Something Like It
programme.desc: The perfect world of a beautiful Seattle television reporter is shattered by the prediction of her death in seven days.

programme.title: You May Not Kiss the Bride
programme.desc: Bryan is a quiet, photographer but when he falls foul of local gangsters, he is forced to marry the boss's daughter, Masha, in order for her to get her green card. They are sent to a remote tropical island for a honeymoon that is far from idyllic.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend has dumped him so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing

programme.title: Bridal Boot Camp
programme.desc: Andy Phillips is preparing for her upcoming wedding with her fiancé, Jordan. However, after chatting with her best friend, Andy starts to question if she has what it takes to make a strong a lasting marriage.

programme.title: The Ex
programme.desc: A slacker is forced to work for his father-in-law after his pregnant wife steps away from her high-paying job. Starring Zach Braff and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: Life With Music
programme.desc: In this life affirming story of hope, struggling pianist finds inspiration with a free-spirited music critic.

programme.title: Cinderella in the Caribbean
programme.desc: Ashlyn Vanderbilt travels with her stepmother Miriam and her fiancé Bruce for their destination wedding. Although Ashlyn finds friendship and love with Bruce's son, Noah, she struggles to have her happily ever after when she discovers that her stepfamily plans to ruin Bruce.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla Bennett and Derek Dray are the hosts of Wake Up, Chicago and for the folks at home, their chemistry is undeniable. Derek is incredibly protective about the format of Wakeup, Chicago while Layla is always looking to shake things up. One morning they discover an adorable baby named Poppy left in a basket in Laylas dressing room. The mother passed away and the caretaker is unable to care for Poppy and is convinced that Layla and Derek will make perfect parents.

programme.title: Minor Details
programme.desc: Someone at the prestigious Danforth Academy is trying to make the students sick! Who could be behind such a terrible trick? Is it Mia and Riley, the rich girls? Or could it be Emily, the Principal's daughter? Maybe it's the wacky Sean Niminsky, or even the eccentric Professor Plume. Whoever it is, Abby, Page, Claire, and Taylor will have to put aside their differences and band together to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Gastro Blast
programme.desc: Homemade Macaroni and Cheese starts with the sauce. Link demonstrates making a roux, which is a cooked mixture of butter and flour that is the foundation of the tasty cheese sauce that envelopes the whole grain macaroni noodles in today's recipe. It's amazing how much science is in something as simple as a smooth and thick sauce.

programme.title: The Shunning
programme.desc: All her life Katie Lapp has longed for the forbidden things, but will her dreams come at a price too dear to pay? Why would Katie's mother, a plain and simple Amish-woman who embraces the old ways, hide a beautiful satin baby dress in the attic? The staggering answers come on the eve of Katie's wedding to widower, Bishop John Beiler, with the arrival of a beautiful “Englisher” woman who has been searching for her, throwing Katie's life – present and future – into confusion.

programme.title: My Birthday Romance
programme.desc: A woman tired of her parents nagging her to find a boyfriend makes a deal with a guy who also doesn't want a relationship to pose as her boyfriend to keep her family off her back until after her birthday party.

programme.title: Encounter with Danger
programme.desc: Jack takes Lori on a trip, disappears, revealing his company's corruption.

programme.title: Shattered Families
programme.desc: Heartbreaking accounts of families torn apart by crime.

programme.title: Kidnapped in Paradise
programme.desc: Savannah brings her husband and daughter back to her birthplace in Australia.

programme.title: Murder in Mexico: The Bruce Beresford-Redman Story
programme.desc: A producer for the show Survivor, takes his wife and their children on vacation.

programme.title: Trapped in the Farmhouse
programme.desc: A woman on the run from her abusive boyfriend seeks shelter in a farmhouse.

programme.title: Forever in My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie reunite in Ireland after five years, and Jenna must choose between love and her dreams.

programme.title: Wish You Were Dead
programme.desc: Hayley Udall tries to make ends meet for herself and her 14 year-old daughter while providing alimony for a horrible ex-husband. She wishes her problems with her ex could go away, and upon venting her frustrations one night, finds herself tangled up in a pact with two people (Melanie and Kevin) to “eliminate” each other's problems.

programme.title: In The Moon's Shadow
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters amid tragedy unlock the truth to family secrets on a self-reflecting journey to see the Great American Eclipse.

programme.title: Sisters of the Groom
programme.desc: Jason ropes his neighbor Sarah into pretending to be his girlfriend for his brother's wedding but his prying sisters suspect something is amiss.

programme.title: Hitch (2005)
programme.desc: New York "date doctor" Alex Hitchens (Will Smith) tries to charm gossip columnist Sara Melas (Eva Mendes) at the same time he is coaching shy Albert (Kevin James) on how to win the love of beautiful heiress Allegra Cole (Amber Valletta).

programme.title: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: A woman (Lopez) takes a job as a chambermaid at a luxury hotel in New York. She meets and falls in love with a debonair heir to an America political dynasty (Fiennes), who mistakes her for a society woman. When her real identity is revealed, the truth sets in about the disparity of their lives.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer's search for Mr. Perfect has left her hopelessly single. She's in for a rude awakening when her bosses team her with Mike Chadway, a hardcore TV personality who promises to spill the ugly truth on what makes men and women tick.

programme.title: Hitch (2005)
programme.desc: New York "date doctor" Alex Hitchens (Will Smith) tries to charm gossip columnist Sara Melas (Eva Mendes) at the same time he is coaching shy Albert (Kevin James) on how to win the love of beautiful heiress Allegra Cole (Amber Valletta).

programme.title: The Taste Of The Savage
programme.desc: A vengeful widow hires a professional killer to train her son so that he can hunt down and kill the men who murdered her husband. The quest for revenge soon becomes an obsession.

programme.title: Navajo
programme.desc: A young Navajo Indian boy is caught up in the conflict of cultures when he rejects the white man's school. Told in semi-documentary style.

programme.title: Canadian Pacific
programme.desc: A surveyor for the Canadian Pacific Railroad must fight fur trappers who oppose the building of the railroad by stirring up Indian rebellion.

programme.title: God Is My Colt
programme.desc: A Army agent goes undercover to clean up corrupt Langford City full of Mexican outlaws.

programme.title: Seven Alone
programme.desc: A frontier family crosses the U.S. by wagon train, hoping for a better life in the Oregon Territory.

programme.title: Genevieve
programme.desc: Cheerful British comedy set against the London to Brighton car rally.

programme.title: Happiest Days of Your Life
programme.desc: Confusion at The Ministry results in a girls school being joined with a boys school, in this rip roaring, laugh a minute, classic English farce.

programme.title: Here Come the Huggetts
programme.desc: The first of a famous series of British family films revolving around a Royal Wedding. The film deals with the ordinary happenings of a typical middle-class household.

programme.title: Vote for Huggett
programme.desc: Comedy film of Huggett's plans to make a lido as a war memorial and the skullduggery that nearly wrecks his chances of election as a borough councillor.

programme.title: Proximity
programme.desc: Close Encounters of the Third Kind' meets 'Independence Day'. Earth is in danger and a loner named Isaac holds the key to unravelling the mystery that will expose the truth behind alien abduction.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: John Carpenter's satiric look at the problems experienced by a crew of bumbling astronauts on a mission to destroy rogue planets.

programme.title: Skyman
programme.desc: The story of Carl who believes he experienced an alien encounter at 10-years-old and is now trying to reconnect with the UFO as the same location.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: The Novel Murders
programme.desc: (2017) Murder mystery with Lori Loughlin. Antiques expert and sleuth Jennifer begins to suspect that a crime scene is a re-enactment of a murder straight out of the pages of a book.

programme.title: An Aurora Teagarden Mystery: Last Scene Alive
programme.desc: (2018) Crime mystery with Candace Cameron Bure and Lexa Doig. Crime buff Aurora discovers she's the inspiration for a new film. But the plot thickens when the actress playing her is killed...

programme.title: An Emma Fielding Mystery: Site Unseen
programme.desc: Whilst on a 17th century archaeology dig, Emma uncovers a body which leads her into a modern-day murder mystery. (2017)

programme.title: The Gourmet Detective
programme.desc: After a shocking murder at his friend's restaurant, a culinary expert uses his mastery of food, drink and cooking to solve the case. Stars Dylan Neal, Brooke Burns (2015)

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A platoon of Marines battles an alien invasion on the streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Dragon Wars
programme.desc: They've made our world their battleground

programme.title: Starship Troopers: Traitor of Mars
programme.desc: A distant Federation outpost Fort Casey comes under attack by bugs. The team on the fast attack ship Alesia is assigned to help the Starship John A. Warden stationed in Fort Casey evacuate along with the survivors and bring military intelligence safely back to Earth. Carl Jenkins, now ministry of Paranormal Warfare, takes the starship on a clandestine mission before its rendezvous with the Alesia and goes missing in the nebula. Now, the battle-hardened troopers are charged with a rescue mission that may lead to a much more sinister consequence than they ever could have imagined...

programme.title: Ultraviolet
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: Risen
programme.desc: RISEN is the epic Biblical story of the Resurrection, as told through the eyes of a non-believer. Clavius, a powerful Roman military tribune, and his aide, Lucius, are tasked with solving the mystery of what happened to Jesus in the weeks following the crucifixion.

programme.title: The Healer
programme.desc: As much as Alec yearns to avoid being attributed any healing powers, more bizarre events keep occurring. Alec, in shock, is discovering the family secret he possesses, a gift… the gift of healing, a gift he must accept or reject.

programme.title: Life at These Speeds
programme.desc: After a teenager's friends are killed in an accident, he finds running allows him to remember them perfectly. Running, however, also brings him notoriety. Soon he finds himself caught between keeping the past alive and making new memories in the present.

programme.title: The Architect
programme.desc: While trying to build their dream home, a couple's lives are turned upside down after hiring an obsessive architect who insists on building his ideal home not theirs.

programme.title: Out of Time
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this spell-binding thriller that co-stars Eva Mendes, Sanaa Lathan and Dean Cain. In a small Florida town bordered by azure seas and sultry secrets, Chief of Police Matt Whitlock (Washington) finds himself caught in the eye of a storm.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: Mortdecai
programme.desc: The British Mi5, his impossibly wife and an international terrorist, debonair art Charlie Mortdecai must traverse the globe armed only with his good looks in a race to recover a stolen painting rumored to contain the code to bank account.

programme.title: Kingsglaive: Final Fantasy XV
programme.desc: The magical kingdom of Lucis is home to the sacred Crystal, and the menacing empire of Niflheim is determined to steal it. King Regis of Lucis (Sean Bean) commands an elite force of soldiers called the Kingsglaive..

programme.title: S11 E20 Cotswolds
programme.desc: Nicki helps couple relocate business to Cotswolds with period character home at £800k.

programme.title: S12 E2 Dorset
programme.desc: Denise aids ex-army couple settle in Dorset with £600K after 30 moves.

programme.title: S12 E4 Cumbria
programme.desc: Alistair aids outdoor-loving couple find Lake District home with £450K.

programme.title: S3 E1 Canvey Island to Rural Essex
programme.desc: Wayne and his family want a grand house in rural Essex with plenty of space inside for entertaining and plenty of room outside for a pool. The only condition is it must be within commuting distance of Canvey's football ground.

programme.title: S18 E5 Norfolk
programme.desc: Jules takes couple period property hunting in Norfolk.

programme.title: S18 E7 Essex
programme.desc: Jonnie aids young couple's equestrian property hunt in Essex.

programme.title: S18 E9 Cumbria
